body: WARRANT#80 shipped -> SLS(85)/9.99. Watchdog/mailbox checked at boot: listener healthy (ticking fine, boot alert was stale), no pending mail. Continued the standing 'maximize real calibration stats' directive: found and fixed the concrete P3B-bracket-recheck anomaly flagged twice before -- ValidateWeightsAgainstFinalBrackets measured fixed-bracket WR vs calibrated-final-bracket WR per regime but only ever regularized weights when the calibrated bracket lost, discarding the fact that the fixed default had already been shown better. Fix: gated input EnableBracketFallbackOnRecheck (default OFF) reverts a regime's SL/TP to the fixed 1.5/2.5 default when the recheck shows it winning AND the fixed WR itself clears a real floor (0.45), not just 'less bad'. Deliberately gated off (not always-on like the weight-regularization it sits beside) since this changes real SL/TP, a higher-stakes decision -- same risk tiering as sign-agnostic entries/soft-membership fitting. Compiled 0 errors, diff-verified purely additive against SLS(84), copied into the terminal's real Experts folder, forge_ledger.json updated through pass_65. Unvalidated against any real run -- needs your go-ahead to flip the flag on plus a completed live run to mean anything. Source, ex4, and updated ledger attached as files.
